title: Wynn Legacy Item Fonts
description: A resourcepack that port the old READABLE font to FRUMA UPDATE
body:
**Important!**\
[Server-Pack-Unlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker) IS REQUIRED

A font pack for the [Wynncraft](https://modrinth.com/server/wynncraft-mmorpg) MMORPG server that backports the classic READABLE font for the Fruma expansion update.

_Know more in gallery!_

this pack replaces Wynncraft's default new font with a cleaner, more legible typeface. It sharpens item names, lore entries, stat lines, and UI messages that were previously hard to read due to the default new font. The result is a much more accessible and visually comfortable interface—especially during intense endgame activities.
